_comment: Deal aggregate lifecycle. Realized as a pure transition function in crm.domain; the load-act-save loop runs in crm.app. Per-instance concurrency: LadybugDB optimistic version check on Save. A conflicting write (ConflictError) is retried (persistRetry) up to MaxRetries with backoff, then the in-memory transition is rolled back and the deal is left unchanged (rolledBack). No per-entity process; each command loads, acts, and saves under the version guard.

_delays.PERSIST_TIMEOUT: 5000 ms - LadybugDB write timeout before a persist attempt is treated as failed
_delays.RETRY_BACKOFF: ~200 ms exponential backoff between optimistic-lock retries

_ignores.reopen: reopen applies to terminal stages only; a deal that has not closed cannot be reopened
reopen applies to terminal stages only
reopen applies to terminal stages only

_ignores.advance: Negotiation is the last open stage; there is no further stage to advance to, only win or lose
_ignores.reopen: reopen applies to terminal stages only

_ignores.advance: Won is terminal; it does not advance
_ignores.lose: a won deal is not directly re-lost; reopen it first

_ignores.advance: Lost is terminal; it does not advance
_ignores.win: a lost deal is not directly won; reopen it first

rolledBack._exhaustive: prior is set by every setPending action to the stage the operation departed from; its codomain is exactly the six DealStage values, so one guarded branch per stage is total
